title: Build a Set of Colored Markers
description: Three CSS marker illustrations demonstrating different color formats. The red marker uses rgba(), the green marker uses hex with an alpha channel (#RRGGBBAA), and the blue marker uses hsl() for gradients and hsla() for its box-shadow, covering the full range of CSS color functions.
objectives: Use rgb() and rgba() to define colors with opacity
Use hex color with an alpha channel (#RRGGBBAA format)
Use hsl() for readable, adjustable color definitions
Use hsla() to add transparency to an hsl color
Apply linear-gradient() to create multi-color backgrounds

files.name: index.html
